(Masterpiece, top quality, 8k resolution:1.2), Pro-level studio photography, shot on Canon EOS R5, 85mm lens. Vibrant and rich color grading, brilliant contrast, Authentic film look, professional lighting.

Subject: looking at camera. Skin Texture: (Maintain original facial features:1.3), flawless and clean complexion, Hyper-realistic pores, natural healthy skin tone, (sharp focus on eyes and facial features:1.3), highly detailed hair, no blur.

CRITICAL RESTORATION: (Clean, brand new, high-quality clothing:1.4), (rich and vibrant clothing colors:1.2), (remove all white scratches and dust spots:1.5), (remove noise:1.3), (fine-grained texture:1.2). The clothing is well-tailored, smooth and premium fabric, completely free of any damage, cracks, or white marks. Background: Softly blurred natural background, highly detailed environment texture, vibrant atmosphere.
